3087990.name: Forever Space: First Person Edition
3087990.description:
Explore an isolated space station to uncover a dark secret behind the station's true purpose.
Search for clues in a 1st person perspective. Question your crewmates. Research your loss of memory. Discover what happened to the missing Overseers.
This experimental interactive short story will keep you guessing until the very end!

FEATURES

  • Immersive First Person perspective.
  • Fully vocalized by talented actors.
  • Experimental Interactive sci-fi thriller.
  • Adapted from the Short Story by Catalina Leon.
3087990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
